title: Psychology Projects
text:
Welcome to my work in psychology! Here are a few things I’ve worked on:


Built a multidimensional extraversion scale and an item-generation tool (Psydeon).



Analyzed ADHD fMRI data using Nilearn and basic VBM pipelines.




Do You Exist? — A beginner’s epistemology guide for psychology students.
The Art of Almost — A personal narrative exploring ADHD.

title: Shannon Fernandes
text:
I’m Shannon — psychologist, coder, and writer. I create thoughtful tools, analyze brains, and write about consciousness, creativity, and cognition.
I work at the intersection of clinical psychology, computation, and design. My projects range from psychometric test platforms to fMRI analysis in Python, from philosophical writing to code that builds psychological insight.
